Best Dentist | Best Dental Clinic | Orthodontic Center in Lucknow Surya Dental Clinic was founded by (Late) Dr. Vijay Srivastava in 1985 and was one of its kind during that time. Dr. Vijay Srivastava was the pioneer who introduced Northern India to the next level of Dental Implants at that time, which he acquired knowledge from Germany. He was completely dedicated to glorifying the smiles of his patients through his practice always. It was of his sheer hard work and conduct that Surya Dental Clinic became a household name and was well known by even children. Dr. Srivastava had built an amazing and fast-growing practice but unfortunately, he passed away in the year 1999.
